Saturn presides over the Anartas, Arbuda (Mt. Abu.), Pu§-
kara, Saurastra, Abhiras, Sudras, people living in or near the
Raivataka mountain, the country where the river Sarasvatidisappe-
ars, the western country, inhabitants of Thaneswar, Prabhasa,
Vidisa. the river Vedasmrti, those that live on the banks of the
river Mahl, rogues, the slovenly, unrighteous persons, oilmongers,
cowards, eunuchs, gaolers and prisoners, fowlers, impure fellows,
fishermen or sailors, deformed persons, aged ones, boar-hunters,
leaders of corporations, those that have fallen from their vows,
Sabaras, Pulindas, the penurious, pungent and bitter substances,

Planetary Ruler ship XVI 201
